categories.name: Tamper System
categories.blurb: Tamper-evident seals & locks that make theft obvious.

categories.name: Index Covers
categories.blurb: Replacement index covers for every major meter line.

categories.name: Paint Covers
categories.blurb: Keep registers clean during field painting.

products.name: A-101 Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 #1 Snap Seal tamper plugs (sold separately)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for American / Honeywell AL-175 and AL-425 meters. Comes with or without the Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: A-101 OS Index Cover
bullets: Incompatible with Snap Seal tamper plugs
products.desc: Open-style A-101 index cover for American / Honeywell AL-175 and AL-425 meters. Available with or without the Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: A-103 Index Cover
bullets: Compatible with 2 #1 Snap Seal tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for American 35B–500B, AL-800–AL5000 and Turbine meters. Includes the optional Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: A-103 OS Index Cover
bullets: Incompatible with Snap Seal tamper plugs
products.desc: Open-style A-103 index cover for American 35B–500B and AL-800–AL5000 meters. Optional Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: A-40G Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 Tophat tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for the Itron 40G ERT on American meters. Available with or without the Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: A-100G Index Cover
bullets: Compatible with 2 Tophat tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for Itron 100G endpoints on American meters. Does not use the Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: R-103 Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 #1 Snap Seal tamper plugs (sold separately)
Available with or without Sure Seal gasket
products.desc: Index cover for Rockwell / Xylem 150 and 415 short-screw meters.

products.name: R-103 OS Index Cover
bullets: Incompatible with Snap Seal tamper plugs
products.desc: Open-style R-103 index cover for Rockwell / Xylem 150 and 415 short-screw meters. Optional Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: R-104 Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 #1 Snap Seal tamper plugs (sold separately)
Available with or without Sure Seal gasket
products.desc: Index cover for Rockwell / Xylem 150–415 long-screw meters.

products.name: R-105 Index Cover
bullets: Compatible with 2 #2 Snap Seal tamper plugs (not included)
Commercial Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for Rockwell R-750–R5000 meters.

products.name: R-40G Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 Tophat tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for the Itron 40G ERT on Rockwell meters.

products.name: R-100G Index Cover
bullets: Compatible with 2 Tophat tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for Itron 100G endpoints on Rockwell meters. Does not use the Sure Seal preapplied gasket.

products.name: S-105 Index Cover
bullets: Accepts 2 #1 Snap Seal tamper plugs (sold separately)
Available with or without Sure Seal gasket
products.desc: Index cover for Sprague 175–400 slant-face meters.

products.name: I-100G Index Cover
bullets: Compatible with 2 Tophat tamper plugs (not included)
Tamper System Kit available
products.desc: Index cover for Itron 100G endpoints on Itron meters.

products.name: Snap Seal #1
products.desc: The original red-plug tamper seal that set the industry standard. Fits index covers A-101, A-103, W-175, R-103, R-109, S-104–S-107, M-110, N-108 and Cup #1 / Cup #8. Snaps on and cannot be removed without visibly breaking.

products.name: Snap Seal #2
products.desc: Larger Snap Seal sized for the R-105 index cover and Cup #2.

products.name: Snap Seal #3
products.desc: Commercial Snap Seal that seats in AHH, ABP and RHH Cup #3 bushings — protects hand-hole and baseplate screws on commercial American and Rockwell meters.

products.name: Tophat Tamper Plug
products.fits: American covers, cups, top castings; Itron ERT
products.desc: Tophat tamper plug for American Meter index covers, cups and meter top castings. Also fits Itron ERT covers.

products.name: TS Plug
products.desc: Tamper plug for Rockwell Meter index covers, cups and meter top castings.

products.name: Cup #1
products.desc: Fits Rockwell and Sprague residential hand-hole plates. Uses Snap Seal #1 and a 10-24 pan-head screw.

products.name: Cup #2
products.desc: Fits the American residential hand-hole plate. Uses Snap Seal #2 and a 1/4-20 pan-head screw.

products.name: Cup #8
products.desc: Fits the American commercial index mounting screw. Uses Snap Seal #1 and an 8/32 x 5/8 pan-head screw.

products.name: Cup Tophat
products.desc: Hand-hole corner-tab cup for the American residential hand hole. Uses a Tophat tamper plug and a 1/4-20 pan-head screw.

products.name: Cup Hex
products.desc: Fits the American residential hex hand-hole plate. Uses Snap Seal #1 and a 1/4-20 fillister-head screw.

products.name: Cup #3 — AHH / ABP / RHH
products.desc: Commercial bushings used with SS #3: AHH protects the American hand-hole (35B–AL5000, 3/8 allen), RHH protects the Rockwell hand-hole (R-415–3000, 5/16 allen), ABP protects the American baseplate (18×18 fillister).

products.name: A-103 Commercial Tamper Kit
products.desc: Complete commercial kit protecting every entry point on American 35B–500B and AL-800–AL5000 meters — A-103 index cover with silicone gasket, Snap Seal #1 plugs, Cup #8, SS #3 and Cup ABP / AHH. Screws included.

products.name: R-105 Commercial Tamper Kit
products.desc: Commercial kit protecting the index cover and hand-hole on Rockwell R-415 and 750–3000 meters — R-105 index cover, Snap Seal #2 plugs, SS #3 and Cup RHH. Screws included.

products.name: PC A1 Paint Cover
products.desc: Snap-on paint cover that protects the register and reading window of A-101 and A-101-OS index covers while meter sets are field-painted.

products.name: PC A3 Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for A-103 and A-103-OS index covers.

products.name: PC A-40G Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for the A-40G index cover.

products.name: PC A-100G Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for the A-100G index cover.

products.name: PC A3-40G Paint Cover
products.fits: A-103 Index Cover & Commercial American 40G ERT
products.desc: Paint cover for the A-103 index cover and the commercial American 40G ERT.

products.name: PC A3 Hinged Paint Cover
products.desc: Hinged paint cover designed for the A-103 index cover — flips open for meter reading without removing the cover.

products.name: PC R3 Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for R-103, R-103-OS and R-104 index covers.

products.name: PC R-40G Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for the R-40G index cover.

products.name: PC R-100G Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for the R-100G index cover.

products.name: PC R5 Paint Cover
products.desc: Paint cover for the R-105 index cover.

products.name: 30-S Index Cover Screw
products.desc: 1/4-20 x 5/8 fillister-head index cover screw for American A-101 and A-101-OS covers.

products.name: 31-S Cup Screw
products.desc: 1/4-20 x 3/4 pan-head screw for Cup #2.

products.name: 32-S Index Cover Screw
products.desc: 12-24 x 1/2 fillister-head index cover screw for American A-103 and A-103-OS covers.

products.name: 33-S Index Mounting Screw
products.desc: 8-32 x 5/8 binder-head index mounting screw for the back of A-103 / A-103-OS covers and Cup #8.

products.name: 34-S Cup ABP Screw
products.desc: 18 x 18 x 1-1/8 fillister-head screw for Cup ABP.

products.name: 35-S Cup AHH Screw
products.desc: 3/8 x 1-1/2 allen-head screw for Cup AHH.

products.name: 36-S Index Screw
products.desc: 8-32 x 3/16 round-head screw for the American AL-175 / 250 index.

products.name: 37-S Combo Case Screw
products.desc: 1/4-20 x 3/4 Rockwell combo case screw.

products.name: 51-S Fillister Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 1/2 fillister-head screw for R-103 / R-103-OS index covers and the Sprague S-105.

products.name: 41-S Fillister Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 3/4 fillister-head screw for R-104 and the Rockwell ERT index cover.

products.name: 42-S Allen Screw
products.desc: 5/16 x 18 x 1 allen-head screw for the RHH Cup and R-105 index cover.

products.name: 43-S Cup #1 Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 5/8 pan-head screw for Cup #1.

products.name: 44-S Fillister Screw
products.desc: 5/16 x 18 x 1 fillister-head screw for R-105.

products.name: 45-S Rockwell Index Screw
products.desc: 6-32 x 5/8 fillister-head screw for the Rockwell index.

products.name: 53-S Long-Thread Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 5/8 longer-thread fillister-head screw for R-103 and the Rockwell hand-hole cover.

products.name: 50-S Flat-Head Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 1 x 5/8 flat-head screw for the Sprague S-104.

products.name: 52-S Drive Stud
products.desc: #6 drive stud for the badge plate on Sprague S-104 and S-105.

products.name: 54-S Pan-Head Screw
products.desc: 10-24 x 1/4 pan-head screw for the residential Sprague index.

products.name: CEP — Commercial ERT Protector
products.desc: Commercial ERT protector — guards the wriggler of your meter before anything bad happens. Essential protection for exposed meter components.

products.name: IDC — Instrument Drive Cover
products.desc: Protective cover that safeguards the wriggler of your meter from damage and environmental factors.

products.name: M-110-OS — Mercury Instrument Drive Cover
products.desc: Specialized instrument drive cover designed for Mercury meters, providing reliable protection. Optional Sure Seal preapplied gasket available.

products.name: RV 250 — Regulator Vent
products.desc: Screen-protected regulator vent designed to prevent bugs and debris from entering and compromising meter interiors.

products.name: 30-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for A-101 and A-101-OS index covers.

products.name: 31-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for A-103 and A-103-OS index covers.

products.name: 32-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for the Itron ERT residential American cover. One side adhesive.

products.name: 40-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for R-103, R-103-OS and R-104 index covers.

products.name: 41-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for the Itron ERT residential Rockwell cover. One side adhesive.

products.name: 50-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for S-105 index covers.

products.name: 51-C Cork Gasket
products.desc: Cork gasket for the Itron ERT residential Sprague cover. One side adhesive.

products.name: Custom Molding
products.desc: Don’t see it? We can design and mold virtually any index cover, cup, or custom part to fit your meters. Bring us a sample or a spec.
